title: Background Music Selector
description: Customize playback of ambient sounds and discs using /music
body:
### Background Music Selector---Customize playback of ambient sounds and discs.

---

This mod adds an in-game command `/music` that allows the player to adjust the currently playing ambient and record sound effects disc.

Requires Fabric API as a depedency.

#### Commands

- `/music ambient AmbientSoundType;` - Plays the specified type of ambient sound.

- `/music disc DiscName;` - Play the specified disc. Use `/music disc RANDOM` to play a random disc.
- `/music volume VolumeLevel` - Adjusts the volume level of the music bar.
- `/music stop` - Stops the currently playing sound.
